title: SEO: Dedicated video sitemap (/api/video-sitemap.xml) for Google Video Pack eligibility
body:
## Problem

MetalForge has VideoObject JSON-LD on ~157 lick pages + 63 drummer profiles (VideoObject shipped in #1010/#183). But there is no dedicated video sitemap — just the main sitemap.xml.

Google's Video Pack and Video search require a video sitemap (/api/video-sitemap.xml using the video: namespace) for maximum eligibility. Without it, Google must discover video metadata from JSON-LD alone, which is less reliable.

## Fix

Create: api/video-sitemap.js (new Vercel serverless function)

Pattern mirrors api/sitemap.js but generates video:sitemap XML covering:
- /drummers/<slug>/licks/<lick-slug> (157 pages) — VideoObject with YouTube URL, name, description, thumbnailUrl
- /drummer/<slug> profile pages (63 pages) — VideoObject for profile YouTube embeds

Add to vercel.json rewrites: { src: '/video-sitemap.xml', dest: '/api/video-sitemap' }
Reference from api/robots.js: Video-Sitemap: https://metalforge.io/video-sitemap.xml

## Already shipped

Fix shipped in PR #1572 (commit 514030c). All three changes in place:
- api/video-sitemap.js: full implementation with xmlEscape, lick pages + drummer profiles
- vercel.json: rewrite { source: '/video-sitemap.xml', destination: '/api/video-sitemap' }
- api/robots.js: Video-Sitemap: https://metalforge.io/video-sitemap.xml
